sample_count_verified: 568 baseline biopsy array samples: 550 moderate-to-severe UC patients plus 18 healthy subjects; UC patients received placebo n=186 or ustekinumab n=364
recommended_overlap_notes: UNIFI randomized placebo-controlled phase 3 ustekinumab UC baseline sigmoid-colon biopsy expression cohort. Count as an independent cohort; no current evidence of subject overlap with Crohn ustekinumab trial rows such as UNITI/CERTIFI.

sample_count_verified: 73 baseline colonic biopsy RNA-seq samples in GEO; publication describes phase 2 etrolizumab UC trial data from 110 UC patients plus a separate observational comparison group
recommended_overlap_notes: EUCALYPTUS phase II etrolizumab UC baseline biopsy RNA-seq cohort. Count as an independent cohort from BERGAMOT/DS085 and GEMINI/DS088; note that the GEO expression dataset is a 73-sample baseline biopsy subset, not the full clinical-trial enrollment.
